tools.name: dns_lookup
tools.description:
Look up DNS records for a domain. Returns A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT records.
Args:
    domain: Domain name (e.g. 'example.com')

tools.name: whois_lookup
tools.description:
Look up WHOIS information for a domain. Returns registrar, dates, nameservers.
Args:
    domain: Domain name (e.g. 'example.com')

tools.name: ssl_check
tools.description:
Check SSL certificate for a domain. Returns issuer, expiry, validity.
Args:
    domain: Domain name (e.g. 'example.com')

tools.name: ip_geolocation
tools.description:
Look up geolocation for an IP address. Returns country, city, ISP.
Args:
    ip: IP address (e.g. '8.8.8.8')
